RAKUTEN WALLET GOES LIVE WITH XRP INTEGRATION | YES | HIGH confidence**
Rakuten Wallet launched on April 15, 2026, integrating XRP as a payment rail[3]. This represents institutional infrastructure adoption that preceded XRP's rally to $1.50.

signals.headline: XRP SPOT ETF ECOSYSTEM REACHES $1 BILLION AUM | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
XRP SPOT ETF ECOSYSTEM REACHES $1 BILLION AUM | YES | HIGH confidence**
Six active spot XRP ETFs are now live in the U.S. with approximately $1 billion in combined assets and 787 million XRP in custody as of mid-April[3]. The first XRP spot ETF (XRPC) achieved the highest first-day AUM of any crypto ETF launched in 2025[3].

signals.headline: SEC LEGAL BATTLE OFFICIALLY RESOLVED | YES | MEDIUM confidence**
signals.raw:
SEC LEGAL BATTLE OFFICIALLY RESOLVED | YES | MEDIUM confidence**
The long-standing SEC legal dispute is described as "officially in the rearview mirror"[1], with XRP ETF approvals entering final stages. This removes a major regulatory overhang.
